Who Should Choose: Adrenaline seekers, those with strong physical and mental resilience, deep commitment to bearing witness
Who Should Avoid: Those with families who need regular presence, risk-averse individuals, or anyone with mental health vulnerabilities
Verdict: One of the most dangerous and demanding journalism careers. Significant impact and international recognition.

Who Should Avoid: Those seeking fast-paced breaking news or who find environmental topics dry
Verdict: Growing field with increasing global importance. Climate journalism is becoming mainstream.

One-Line Summary: Crafts compelling speeches and communication strategies for political leaders
